title: Vazhappully temple
tagline: Vazhappully temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Vazhappully Shree Rajarajeshwari temple is a Hindu temple located at Kazhimbram near Valapad in Thrissur District.
overview.description: Vazhappully Shree Rajarajeshwari temple is a Hindu temple located at Kazhimbram near Valapad in Thrissur District. This is one of the few family temples in Kerala worshipping Gandharva.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chendrappini
topPlaces.description: Chendrappini is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India. It is in Kodungallur taluk.There is a hospital named Al-iqbal.

topPlaces.description: Chentrappinni is a small village in the district of Thrissur district, Kerala, India. Indian National Highway 66 passes through Chentrappinni.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vazhappully temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vazhappully temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vazhappully temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (40 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (48 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vazhappully temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vazhappully temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vazhappully temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vazhappully temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vazhappully temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chendrappini, Chentrappinni, Edathiruthy, Kuttamangalam, Valapad.
